summary: Test suite has reasonable structure but is critically incomplete. Major gaps: (1) Fixture files referenced (test-fixtures/mixed-config.json, all-ok-config.json) but not provided—tests cannot run; (2) No error handling tests despite implementation validating config, dates, required fields; (3) No edge case or boundary condition testing (exact expiry date, warning window boundary, empty arrays, negative/extreme policy days); (4) No parameter variation testing (custom WarningWindowDays override, custom ReferenceDate, warningWindowDays from config); (5) Only integration tests via act workflow, no unit tests of script in isolation. Covers basic happy paths (1 expired/1 warning/1 ok and all-ok scenarios) and validates workflow structure/actionlint, but would miss regressions in error paths, edge cases, and parameter handling. Without fixture files, tests cannot execute as provided.
